task: I need to text a coworker about covering my section for the last hour because something came up. Can you help me put together a message that gets the point across clearly and doesn’t overcomplicate it?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here are a few clean options:

**Simple:**
“Hey, something came up and I need you to cover my section for the last hour. I appreciate it.”

**A little more direct:**
“Hey, something came up unexpectedly, so I need you to cover my section for the last hour. Thanks.”

**If you want it extra brief:**
“Something came up, and I need you to cover my section for the last hour. Appreciate it.”

If you want, I can also make it sound **more casual** or **more firm**.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that works. The short one is fine. I’d probably send:

“Something came up, can you cover my section for the last hour? Appreciate it.”

Simple. No extra details.
